name: Act on the Protection of Personal Information
description: Japan's Act on the Protection of Personal Information — Japan's primary data protection statute, last amended 2022. Enforced by the Personal Information Protection Commission (PPC).
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud services handling Japanese personal data must comply.
relationToAISecurity: AI systems processing Japanese personal data covered.
